title: Behind Asukas Eyepatch Purely Speculation
wikitext:
[]: Behind Asuka's Eyepatch (Purely Speculation)             Quote Post by Gus Hanson » Wed Jul 11, 2018 12:27 pm I chalk this up mainly to a dream I had last night and speculation on whether or not this might come true. I have this theory now that Asuka has literally a white nothingness behind her eyepatch much like for example the taxi driver from Home Alone 2. Let me explain, I know that during moments of emotion it glows and shows a blue retina but I think that's only during those times or perhaps I need to watch the movie again. I gather that in Final, Shinji might have a moment of confronting Asuka and he accidentally rips the eyepatch out and Asuka shows that she has the absence of anything behind what used to be a perfectly working eye. Again purely speculation and a dream I had but worth talking about.

[]: Re: Behind Asuka's Eyepatch (Purely Speculation)             Quote Post by pwhodges » Wed Jul 11, 2018 1:31 pm One thing we know is that the eyepatch has angel-sealing glyphs on it, so it is reasonable to assume some level of known or suspected remaining angelic contamination.

[]: Re: Behind Asuka's Eyepatch (Purely Speculation)             Quote Post by Gus Hanson » Wed Jul 11, 2018 2:08 pm Right because I do remember in my dream the word "contamination" being repeated throughout Shinji and Asuka's confrontation as well as the eye glowing blue which is the color pattern of the Angels.

[]: Re: Behind Asuka's Eyepatch (Purely Speculation)             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jul 11, 2018 10:29 pm Asuka's visible iris glows while beast mode is active, so presumably the blue glow beneath the eyepatch is the other still-intact iris similarly glowing.

[]: Re: Behind Asuka's Eyepatch (Purely Speculation)             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Jul 12, 2018 7:35 am It glows when she calls Shinji a brat for the first time too. So I think the implication is the glow is somehow linked to emotion. I don't know what the eyepatch is symbolizing in the bigger picture though, other than her being a worn warrior.

[]: Re: Behind Asuka's Eyepatch (Purely Speculation)             Quote Post by Akko » Fri Jul 27, 2018 10:56 pm It's very likely that Asuka's glowing left eye is related to the 9th angel incident, but didn't Ritsuko state that all physical damage is gone but the angel may have infiltrated in her mind? And It seems that Asuka's left eye glows when she's experiencing negative/extreme emotions and her eyepatch has angel sealing hex glyphs like Shinji's collar, as if it was supressing whatever is behind that eyepatch. I have 2 hypothesis: A) Bardiel isn't really dead, it lives in Asuka's mind and threatens to take over B) The eyepatch is to keep Asuka from losing control and turning into an Angel We'll have to wait 2 years to truly know what's going on with Asuka's left eye.
